title: Fix Color Scheme, Font Pairing, and Background Style selectors not updating preview or persisting on save

requirements.summary: Fix ColorSchemePicker to update InvitationFormContext and reflect changes in live preview
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a color scheme swatch in ColorSchemePicker updates the form context's color scheme field immediately.
The TemplatePreview component re-renders to reflect the newly selected color scheme without a page reload.
The selected color scheme is persisted when the invitation is saved.

file_operations.description: Replace local selectedScheme state with controlled behavior using the value prop and onChange callback. When a color scheme card is clicked, call onChange(scheme.id) to propagate the selection to the parent component (TemplateThemeStep). Remove the internal useState hook and make the component fully controlled by its parent.

requirements.summary: Fix FontSelector to update InvitationFormContext and reflect changes in live preview
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a font pairing option in FontSelector updates the form context's font pairing field immediately.
The TemplatePreview component re-renders using the selected font pairing's heading and body fonts.
The selected font pairing is persisted when the invitation is saved.

file_operations.description: Replace local selectedFont state with controlled behavior using the value prop and onChange callback. When a font card is clicked, call onChange(font) to propagate the selection to the parent component (TemplateThemeStep). Remove the internal useState hook and make the component fully controlled by its parent.

requirements.summary: Fix Background Style selector to update InvitationFormContext and reflect changes in live preview
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting a background style option updates the form context's background style field immediately.
The TemplatePreview component re-renders to show the selected background style (e.g., watercolor texture, ornate border).
The selected background style is persisted when the invitation is saved.

file_operations.description: Wire the Background Style radio group to call updateFormData with the correct field name matching what TemplatePreview expects (backgroundChoice). Pass controlled value and onChange handlers to ColorSchemePicker and FontSelector so they update the form context via updateFormData. Ensure the onColorSchemeChange callback updates formData.colorScheme, onFontChange updates formData.fontChoice, and the background style RadioGroup onChange updates formData.backgroundChoice.

requirements.summary: Audit and fix data flow between selectors and TemplatePreview to ensure reactive state updates
acceptanceCriteria: ColorSchemePicker, FontSelector, and the Background Style selector all call updateFormData with the correct field names matching those consumed by TemplatePreview.
TemplatePreview reads colorScheme, fontPairing, and backgroundStyle directly from InvitationFormContext (not from stale local state or props).
No selector selection is silently lost or overwritten during re-renders or step navigation.

file_operations.description: Replace prop-based data access with useInvitationForm hook to read colorScheme (formData.colorScheme), fontChoice (formData.fontChoice), and backgroundChoice (formData.backgroundChoice) directly from InvitationFormContext. Remove any local state that duplicates context values. Ensure the component re-renders reactively whenever these context values change.

requirements.summary: Ensure existing invitation data is hydrated into InvitationFormContext on editor load
acceptanceCriteria: Opening an existing invitation in the editor pre-selects the saved color scheme, font pairing, and background style in their respective selectors.
The TemplatePreview shows the previously saved customization immediately on load.
Saving the invitation persists the current selector values to the backend without resetting them.

file_operations.description: Ensure the useEffect that hydrates invitation data into formData includes colorScheme, fontChoice, and backgroundChoice fields from the loaded invitation object. Verify that updateFormData is called with all theme-related fields when the invitation query succeeds, so TemplateThemeStep selectors and TemplatePreview display the saved values correctly on mount.
